ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., Consultative Meeting, Annual Meeting) */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization hosting the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the event is held */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the event website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, past) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization (e.g., Antarctic Treaty, ISMRM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the organization website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Helsinki, Finland) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code associated with the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the speaker */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the speaker belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the speaker */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the speaker's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speakers_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_speakers" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization the attendee belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the attendee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the attendee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., attending, not attending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id", "attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accommodations" (
  "accommodation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accommodation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of accommodation (e.g., hotel, hostel) */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room (e.g., single, double) */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Rate per night */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accommodation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accommodations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accommodations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "session_description" TEXT /* Description of the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_speakers" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id", "speaker_id")
)
column_names: Name of the event (e.g., Consultative Meeting, Annual Meeting)
ID of the organization hosting the event
ID of the location where the event is held
Status of the event (e.g., upcoming, ongoing, past)

Name of the location (e.g., Helsinki, Finland)
City where the location is situated
Country where the location is situated
Unique identifier for each event type
Color code associated with the event type

ID of the organization the attendee belongs to
